source: SEMrush On-Page SEO Checker export ideas_www.mattressstoreslosangeles.com_20260612.xlsx (2,556 idea rows, ~250 URLs)
appliedVia: Code overrides (this PR) + Shopify MCP articleUpdate metafield batch (global.title_tag), session 2026-06-12

staleFindings.note: The export's per-page data predates this week's and Phase 308's fixes. Verified-stale flag classes, no action taken:
items: title/h1 flags on tempur-pedic / king-size / queen-size / twin-size PLPs and the homepage — Phase 308 overrides + sr-only H1 already cover the flagged variants (verified in lib/collection-seo-overrides.ts + app/(storefront)/page.tsx)
no-internal-links on 90 blog articles — post-#440 related-links rotation gives every article ~4+; live check of best-cooling-mattress-guide found 54 unique internal hrefs
aggregate-rating on collections — live PLP fetch shows AggregateRating (4.5, 11,423 reviews) already in the CollectionPage JSON-LD
mattress-sizes title/h1 — override title (chart/feet/inches) + merchant H1 (bed size chart variants) jointly cover the flagged keywords
adjustable-queen article — existing seo.title already carries 'Adjustable Queen Bed and Mattress'

policyDecisions: aggregate-rating on 75 blog articles: SKIPPED (user decision) — Google treats ratings on advice articles as self-serving; FAQPage/HowTo JSON-LD remains the rich-result path for articles

'cheap queen mattress near me' (1,244 priority, mis-assigned to /pages/mattress-store-locations): REASSIGNED — 'cheap/affordable queen' now lives on the best-affordable-queen-mattress article title and the queen PLP description; locations page untouched
'queen mattresses on sale near me' (queen PLP): REASSIGNED to /collections/on-sale title/description

'best mattress for back pain' missing from best-mattress-for-bad-back title: DELIBERATELY NOT ADDED — would cannibalize best-mattress-for-back-pain-guide and the 2026-06-10 LA back-pain article; bad-back title strengthened on its own term instead
codeChanges: lib/collection-seo-overrides.ts: +6 new handles (mattresses, on-sale, bed-frames, gel-foam-mattresses, spring-air-mattresses, latex-mattresses) + descriptions for queen-size/twin-size
data/url-inventory/redirects-manual.json: +3 legacy /pages/faq/* URLs that 404 live (176/117/117 priority) -> matching commercial PLPs
